usecase.name: [Sample App] Contact Form Validation
usecase.description: Verify form validation errors appear for invalid input

steps.instruction: Navigate to the Contact page using the navigation bar
Click the 'Send Message' button without filling any fields
Verify error message 'Name must be at least 2 characters' appears
Verify error message 'Please enter a valid email' appears
Verify error message 'Please select a subject' appears
Verify error message 'Message must be at least 10 characters' appears
Type 'J' into the Full Name field
Verify the name error still shows since 'J' is less than 2 characters
Verify the email error still shows since 'invalid-email' is not a valid email
